languages.text: "Я дарую тебе прощение. Иокаста, отведи его на родную палубу и выдай самые сильные болеутоляющие".

traits.locale_text: "Я дарю тебе прощение. Иокаста, отведи его на родную палубу и выдай самые сильные болеутоляющие".

languages.text: "I grant you clemency. Jocasta, take him back to his deck and give him the strongest painkillers we have."
languages.original_text: "Я дарую тебе прощение. Иокаста, отведи его на родную палубу и выдай самые сильные болеутоляющие".

traits.locale_text: "I grant you forgiveness. Jocasta, take him back to his deck and give him the strongest painkillers we have."
"I grant you forgiveness. Jocasta, take him back to his deck and give him the strongest painkillers we have."
"I grant you clemency. Jocasta, take him back to his deck and give him the strongest painkillers we have."
"I grant you clemency. Jocasta, take him back to his deck and give him the strongest painkillers we have."

languages.text: "Ich gewähre Euch Gnade. Jocasta, bringt ihn zurück auf sein Deck und gebt ihm die stärksten Schmerzmittel, die wir haben."
languages.original_text: "I grant you clemency. Jocasta, take him back to his deck and give him the strongest painkillers we have."

traits.locale_text: "Ich gewähre Euch Gnade. Jocasta, bringt ihn zurück auf sein Deck und gebt ihm die stärksten Schmerzmittel, die wir haben."

languages.text: « Je vous accorde ma clémence. Jocasta, ramenez-le sur son pont et donnez-lui les analgésiques les plus puissants dont nous disposons. »
languages.original_text: "I grant you clemency. Jocasta, take him back to his deck and give him the strongest painkillers we have."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous accorde ma clémence. Jocasta, ramenez-le sur son pont et donnez-lui les analgésiques les plus puissants dont nous disposons. »

languages.text: “我宽恕你。约卡斯塔，把他带回他的甲板，给他用我们最强效的止痛药。”
languages.original_text: "I grant you clemency. Jocasta, take him back to his deck and give him the strongest painkillers we have."

traits.locale_text: “我宽恕你。约卡斯塔，把他带回他的甲板，给他用我们最强效的止痛药。”

languages.text: «Seré clemente. Jocasta, llévelo a su cubierta y consígale los mejores analgésicos de los que disponemos».
languages.original_text: "I grant you clemency. Jocasta, take him back to his deck and give him the strongest painkillers we have."

traits.locale_text: «Seré clemente. Jocasta, llévelo a su cubierta y consígale los mejores analgésicos de los que disponemos».

languages.text: 「許してやろう。ジョカスタ、彼をデッキに戻し、私たちが持っている最強の鎮痛剤を与えてくれ」
languages.original_text: "I grant you clemency. Jocasta, take him back to his deck and give him the strongest painkillers we have."

traits.locale_text: 「許してやろう。ジョカスタ、彼をデッキに戻し、私たちが持っている最強の鎮痛剤を与えてくれ」

languages.text: "Seni bağışlıyorum. Jocasta, onu güvertesine geri götür ve elimizdeki en güçlü ağrı kesicileri ver."
languages.original_text: "I grant you clemency. Jocasta, take him back to his deck and give him the strongest painkillers we have."

traits.locale_text: "Seni bağışlıyorum. Jocasta, onu güvertesine geri götür ve elimizdeki en güçlü ağrı kesicileri ver."
